assets.scope_evidence: At the pinned source commit, README.md states that UR8LONG, UR15, UR18, UR20 and UR30 meshes use separate Graphical Documentation terms and that all other content is BSD-3-Clause; package.xml declares BSD-3-Clause and repeats that special-model list. UR5e is not in the special list.
